description: Yoshi Labs builds websites, AI assistants, SEO, and automations for Filipino SMEs. Founded by Prince Yoshiko Intes and FINN (AI co-founder).

services.name: Professional Website
services.description: Premium website with animations, mobile-first, SEO-ready. 5 pages. Built in 3-5 days.

services.name: Google SEO & Maps
services.description: Show up when customers search. Google Business Profile, local SEO, Maps optimization.

services.name: AI Assistant
services.description: 24/7 AI answers customers on Messenger. Taglish. Books appointments. Follows up automatically.

services.name: Smart Automations
services.description: Reminders, follow-ups, review requests, welcome messages — all on autopilot.

pricing.contract: No contracts. Cancel anytime after setup.

about.story: Yoshi Labs was founded by Prince Yoshiko Intes, a Filipino-Canadian entrepreneur who saw that 77% of Filipino SMEs want to go digital — but only 3% have adopted AI. Traditional agencies charge ₱30-50K/month for websites that look the same. We saw an opening: build systems that combine human design with AI speed. Each site we ship is built in 3-5 days, costs a fraction of traditional rates, and comes with an AI assistant that never sleeps. We are based in Davao, Philippines and work with businesses across the country.

team.name: Prince Yoshiko Intes
team.bio: Filipino-Canadian entrepreneur. Runs Yoshi Labs alongside FINN.

faq.question: Do I need any tech knowledge?
faq.answer: None at all. We handle everything — setup, maintenance, updates. You just run your business.

faq.question: How fast can you build my website?
faq.answer: 3-5 business days from the time you send us your business info. Often faster.

faq.question: What if I already have a website?
faq.answer: We'll audit it for free and show you exactly what to improve. Most websites need a complete rebuild to be competitive.

faq.question: What does the AI Assistant actually do?
faq.answer: It answers customer inquiries on Messenger 24/7 — pricing, availability, booking, FAQs. It speaks Taglish and English. It follows up with leads automatically. It books appointments.

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes. No contracts. After the initial setup, you can cancel the monthly retainer anytime. Your website stays yours.

faq.question: What industries do you work with?
faq.answer: Any Filipino SME — restaurants, salons, clinics, real estate, retail, professional services, housekeeping, catering, construction. If you have customers, we can help.

faq.question: Why is it so affordable?
faq.answer: Because AI does 80% of the work. We pass those savings to you. Traditional agencies charge ₱30-50K/mo for less.

notes: Yoshi Labs own website. Must be the BEST site we've ever built. Dark mode with gradient accents. monopo-saigon design DNA: deep black base, animated gradient hero, Roobert font, pill buttons, spacious layout.
